<dim>bg-3 librarian [failed]</dim> <muted>—</muted> Read docs
<dim>next:</dim> <accent>/pantheon-task-actions bg-3</accent>

<accent>**Tasks**</accent>
• <error>failed</error> <accent>librarian</accent> <dim>bg-3</dim> <muted>—</muted> Read docs
• <accent>running</accent> <accent>fixer</accent> <dim>bg-1</dim> <muted>—</muted> Implement thing
<dim>… +1 more task</dim>

<accent>**Todos**</accent>
<dim>○</dim> First todo item
<dim>○</dim> Second todo item
<dim>… +1 more todo</dim>

<accent>**Keys**</accent>
<accent>o</accent> overview report
<accent>p</accent> Pantheon launcher
<accent>t</accent> task actions for bg-3
<accent>r</accent> refresh
<accent>q / Esc</accent> close
